allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const scriptMatch=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if\(scriptMatch\){ try{ require\('vm'\).runInNewContext\(scriptMatch[scriptMatch.length-1].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\).replace\(/document\\./g,'\({querySelector:\(\)=>\({classList:{remove:\(\)=>{},add:\(\)=>{}},forEach:\(\)=>{},style:{}},addEventListener:\(\)=>{},getElementById:\(\)=>\({classList:{remove:\(\)=>{},add:\(\)=>{}},innerHTML:\\"\\"}\),querySelectorAll:\(\)=>[],scrollTo:\(\)=>{}}\).'\).replace\(/window\\./g,'\({addEventListener:\(\)=>{}}\).'\).replace\(/localStorage/g,'\({getItem:\(\)=>null,setItem:\(\)=>{}}\)'\).replace\(/history\\./g,'\({pushState:\(\)=>{}}\).'\).replace\(/location\\./g,'\({hash:\\"\\"}\).'\)\); console.log\('No syntax error'\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('ERROR:',e.message.substring\(0,200\)\); } }")
